findings.jp_expected: (none — likely a difficulty/level indicator icon misread as 'A')
findings.trace: Line 5 of OCR output contains a lone 'A' between the section header and the image reference. This appears to be a level/difficulty icon (often rendered as a star or letter grade in textbooks) that was OCR'd as the letter A. Not propagated to structured output or release pages.
findings.recommended_fix: Strip isolated single uppercase Latin letters on their own line when surrounded by Japanese section headers and image refs.
